Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Trigger SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Set the special effect ID that will be the summoning condition

Fields.Name: NPC Param ID
Fields.Description: Set the NPC parameter ID of the summoned buddy

Fields.Name: NPC Think Param ID
Fields.Description: Sets the NPC Thinking Parameter ID of the summoned buddy

Fields.Name: Active SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: SpEffect applied when buddy is actively summoned

Fields.Name: Inactive SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: SpEffect applied when buddy is not actively summoned

Fields.Name: Spawn Offset: X (left/right)
Fields.Description: Sets the distance in meters to offset the buddy from the summon point to the X coordinate (left/right).

Fields.Name: Spawn Offset: Z (forward/back)
Fields.Description: Sets the distance in meters to offsets the buddy from the summon point to the Z coordinate (forwad/back).

Fields.Name: Spawn Angle: Y
Fields.Description: Sets summon position rotation.

Fields.Name: Appear near Stone Monument
Fields.Description: Forces summon to spawn at summon monument.

Fields.Name: Disable Player Target Share
Fields.Description: Disables summon targeting whoever PC locked-onto.

Fields.Name: Player Follow Type
Fields.Description: Determines PC tracking and non-combat behavior.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +0
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +0

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +1
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +1.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +2
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +2.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +3
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +3.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +4
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +4.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +5
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +5.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +6
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +6.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +7
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +7.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +8
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +8.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +9
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +9.

Fields.Name: Reinforcement SpEffect: +10
Fields.Description: SpEffect granted when reinforced to +10.

Fields.Name: Character Init ID
Fields.Description: CharaInitParam ID this c0000 summon will use.

Fields.Name: Generate Anim ID
Fields.Description: Generate Anime ID

Fields.Name: Shortcut Text ID
Fields.Description: The shortcut key text for this summon.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon used for buddy in UI

Fields.Name: Base Leveling SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Base SpEffect ID used for leveling with character (see HeroStatusParam).
